entry_metrics_out: train_metrics.json (fields: acc, loss_curve, params, duration_sec, config)
dummy_input: torch.randn(batch_size=1, 64) — model expects flat 64-dim vectors (sklearn digits 8x8), not (1,1,28,28) MNIST images

variant_naming.how_entry_loads_it: Overwrite projects/mnist/model.py with variant file before training run. Entry hardcodes 'from model import ConfigurableMLP', so variant file must export class ConfigurableMLP(nn.Module).
